title: Salty Velvety Greek Lemon Pepper Stir-Fry
description: A monsoon-inspired dish featuring a salty and velvety texture with the addition of fresh coriander leaves, incorporating a tadka for added flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 cup finely chopped fresh coriander leaves

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned. Add minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Pour in lemon juice and let it reduce slightly, stirring occasionally.
Sprinkle salt and pepper to taste over the mixture.
Stir in finely chopped coriander leaves and mix well.
Add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, and green chilies. Tadka (tempering) can be done by heating oil and adding these spices on high heat for a few seconds before adding them to the main dish.
Simmer until all liquids are absorbed, adjusting seasoning as needed.
Serve hot with crusty bread or rice.
